data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of race condition handling (first tap wins), but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is implemented. While the linked use case describes a scenario where multiple users tap to claim a spot, it does not provide concrete evidence of the system's behavior in handling these concurrent requests. Specifically, there is no evidence showing that only the first tap receives confirmation while others are notified of failure, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of race condition handling where only the first tap wins.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for race condition handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that only the first tap receives a booking confirmation while others receive a failure notification.
